title: AuditEvent
description: Append-only audit event recording a create/update/delete/status-change on a registry entity (FR-032..FR-034). One document per event in the registry-audit Cosmos container. Spec 008 (T149) added five additional eventType values + an optional lifecycleReason — see specs/008-namespace-onboarding/contracts/namespace-audit-event.schema.json for the full namespace-onboarding shape (a strict superset that the same container stores side-by-side with spec-006 events; consumers tolerate both via the eventType discriminator).

entityId.description: Subject of the change. Cosmos partition key (/entityId).

eventType.description: Spec 006 emits Created/Updated/Deleted/StatusChanged on Manual-source documents. Spec 008 (T149) emits the five Namespace* values on Onboarded-source documents. Both share the same registry-audit Cosmos container.

principalId.description: Entra OID of the acting user.

fieldChanges.description: Field-level diff. Present on Updated and StatusChanged; null on Created and Deleted.

wasForceOverwrite.description: True iff the originating PUT carried _overwriteAcknowledged=true and the API detected a conflict (FR-020).

correlationId.description: W3C traceparent trace ID. Links back to the originating frontend trace in App Insights (FR-042, SC-012).

lifecycleReason.description: Spec 008 (T149) — populated only on NamespaceLifecycleTransitioned events; the reason note supplied by the namespace administrator at transition time. Null on every other eventType.
